cards.name: Communication Stone
rules_text: While attuned to and carrying the stone, you can expend 1 charge to cast the Sending spell through it.
The stone regains 1d4 expended charges daily at dawn.
Whenever a charge is expended, roll a d100. On a roll of 100, the Communication Stone is destroyed.
cards.flavor_text: It delivers messages flawlessly — until it doesn't.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Personal Space
rules_text: This foldable arcane door can be unfolded and placed on a solid surface as an action. When opened, it leads to an extradimensional space bound to the door.
- The extradimensional space has a fixed size of 6 × 6 × 6 meters.
- Can only be entered or exited through this door.
- If the door gets destroyed its contents is scattered in the Astral Plane.
- The attuned person grands the premission to enter the room.
- The attunement stays active as long the attuned person is alive or dismisses it.
cards.flavor_text: Some matters are best handled behind a firmly closed door.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Harvestwarden Orb
rules_text: At dusk, you may perform a 10-minute ritual while holding this elven orb to influence the next day’s natural weather within a 6-mile radius.
Choose one: cause light to moderate rainfall, prevent rainfall, calm or moderately strengthen winds, thin or thicken cloud cover, or create or disperse natural fog.
The orb cannot create extreme or unnatural weather and only shifts existing conditions.
Once used, the orb can’t be used again until it recharges. At dawn, roll a d20. On a 19 or 20, it regains its use.
cards.flavor_text: The old elves did not command the sky. They asked — and the sky remembered.
cards.author: wschu
